notes: Two-leg AUDUSD/EURJPY market-neutral FX cointegration candidate from the 2026-06-09 66-pair scan rerun. It did not clear the original hard survivor bar; DEV Sharpe was positive but OOS net Sharpe was negative. It is the next unbuilt rank-25 tail pair after the existing 12532/12533/12624/12712/12723/12728/12731/12732/12735/12739/12747/12749/12751/12756/12758/12760/12762/12764/12765/12766/12768/12770/12772/12776 baskets.

Q02 uses EUR tester currency and the canonical RISK_FIXED=1000 account-currency budget. AUDUSD.DWX and EURJPY.DWX are the traded legs; EURUSD.DWX is declared only as custom-symbol conversion history for EUR-denominated AUDUSD accounting.

Repair note 2026-06-30: two prior Q02 attempts failed with NO_HISTORY after USD-denominated EURJPY accounting fell through from USDJPY.DWX to bare USDJPY. The EUR tester account avoids that conversion path while keeping all declared symbols in the Darwinex .DWX namespace.
